title: The Coriolis Effect Explained
script_summary: The Coriolis effect uniquely influences weather patterns through Earth's rotation.

segments.voiceover: Ever wonder why hurricanes spin? It's Earth's rotation!
The Coriolis effect deflects air and water, shaping weather across the globe.
It’s not just hurricanes; everything from ocean currents to wind patterns is influenced.
And no, toilets don’t swirl differently in different hemispheres. That's a myth!
The Coriolis effect is vital for predicting weather and understanding our planet's mechanics.
Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow button!
